'''âl-s-p-b''' ('''kalaspeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:mommick|mommick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mommick|mommick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-s-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| kalaspeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilaspeboko|thilaspeboko]] || [[word:jilaspeboko|jilaspeboko]] || [[word:shilaspeboko|shilaspeboko]] || [[word:kilaspeboko|kilaspeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulaspeboko|thuthulaspeboko]] || [[word:jujulaspeboko|jujulaspeboko]] || [[word:shushulaspeboko|shushulaspeboko]] || [[word:kukulaspeboko|kukulaspeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulaspeboko|thulaspeboko]] || [[word:julaspeboko|julaspeboko]] || [[word:shulaspeboko|shulaspeboko]] || [[word:kulaspeboko|kulaspeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholaspeboko|tholaspeboko]] || [[word:jolaspeboko|jolaspeboko]] || [[word:sholaspeboko|sholaspeboko]] || [[word:kolaspeboko|kolaspeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlaspeboko|thĂŠlaspeboko]] || [[word:jĂŠlaspeboko|jĂŠlaspeboko]] || [[word:shĂŠlaspeboko|shĂŠlaspeboko]] || [[word:kĂŠlaspeboko|kĂŠlaspeboko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalaspeboko|thalaspeboko]] || [[word:jalaspeboko|jalaspeboko]] || [[word:shalaspeboko|shalaspeboko]] || [[word:kalaspeboko|kalaspeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalaspeboko|thalaspeboko]] || [[word:jalaspeboko|jalaspeboko]] || [[word:shalaspeboko|shalaspeboko]] || [[word:kalaspeboko|kalaspeboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
